date_created.description: The date when the infrastructure configuration was created.

date_updated.description: The date when the infrastructure configuration was last updated.

description.description: A brief description of the infrastructure configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier for the infrastructure configuration.

instance_metadata_options.description: Options for configuring instance metadata, such as HTTP tokens and hop limit.

instance_profile_name.description: The name of the instance profile associated with the configuration.

instance_types.description: The set of instance types that can be used with this infrastructure configuration.

key_pair.description: The name of the key pair used for SSH access to the instance.

logging.description: Configuration for logging, including the S3 bucket and key prefix for logs.

name.description: The name of the infrastructure configuration.

resource_tags.description: A map of tags to apply to resources created with this infrastructure configuration.

security_group_ids.description: The set of security group IDs associated with the configuration.

sns_topic_arn.description: The ARN of the SNS topic for notifications related to the infrastructure configuration.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet in which to launch the instance.

tags.description: A map of tags to apply to the infrastructure configuration itself.

terminate_instance_on_failure.description: Indicates whether to terminate the instance if image creation fails.
